---
---

## Slide 1 - Single paragraph

A single paragraph on this slide.

## Slide 2 - Multiple paragraphs

First paragraph on this slide.

Second paragraph on this slide.

## Slide 3 - Paragraph with inline markdown

A paragraph with **bold** and *italic* text.

## Slide 4 - Paragraph alongside image

A paragraph alongside an image.

![](../image.png)
